lessons.name: Unit 10: Planet Earth
lessons.description: Learn about Planet Earth with non-defining relative clauses.

sections.heading: 1. Từ vựng (Vocabulary)
sections.content:
Planet Earth: planet, Earth, globe, world, atmosphere, climate, weather, temperature, season, ecosystem, biodiversity

Environmental issues: pollution, global warming, climate change, deforestation, greenhouse effect, carbon dioxide, fossil fuel, renewable energy, solar power, wind power

Natural resources: water, air, soil, forest, ocean, mineral, oil, gas, coal, resource, conservation

Actions: protect, preserve, conserve, save, reduce, reuse, recycle, prevent, combat, tackle

sections.heading: 2. Luyện tập từ vựng
sections.content: Practice using vocabulary in context about Planet Earth, environmental issues, and conservation.

sections.heading: 3. Ngữ pháp (Grammar)
sections.content:
Non-defining Relative Clauses (Mệnh đề quan hệ không xác định)

A. Khái niệm:

  • Mệnh đề quan hệ không xác định: bổ sung thông tin thêm, không cần thiết để xác định danh từ
  • Có dấu phẩy (,) ngăn cách
  • Có thể bỏ mệnh đề này mà câu vẫn có nghĩa
  • Ex: My brother, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher. (đã biết anh trai nào)

B. So sánh Defining vs Non-defining:

  • Defining (Xác định):
  • - Không có dấu phẩy
  • - Cần thiết để xác định
  • - Có thể dùng 'that'
  • Ex: The student who studies hard will pass. (học sinh nào?)
  • Non-defining (Không xác định):
  • - Có dấu phẩy
  • - Bổ sung thông tin
  • - KHÔNG dùng 'that'
  • Ex: My brother, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher. (đã biết anh trai)

C. Đại từ quan hệ trong mệnh đề không xác định:

  • who: người
  • Ex: Mr. Smith, who is our teacher, is very kind.
  • which: vật, động vật
  • Ex: Ha Long Bay, which is in Vietnam, is beautiful.
  • whose: sở hữu
  • Ex: My friend, whose father is a doctor, lives here.
  • where: nơi chốn
  • Ex: London, where I was born, is a big city.
  • when: thời gian
  • Ex: Summer, when it's hot, is my favorite season.

D. Lưu ý quan trọng:

  • KHÔNG dùng 'that' trong mệnh đề không xác định
  • Sai: Ha Long Bay, that is in Vietnam, is beautiful. ✗
  • Đúng: Ha Long Bay, which is in Vietnam, is beautiful. ✓
  • KHÔNG thể bỏ đại từ quan hệ
  • Sai: My brother, lives in Hanoi, is a teacher. ✗
  • Đúng: My brother, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher. ✓
  • Luôn có dấu phẩy
  • Trước mệnh đề: dấu phẩy mở (,)
  • Sau mệnh đề (nếu câu chưa kết thúc): dấu phẩy đóng (,)

E. Ví dụ chi tiết:

  • My mother, who is a teacher, loves reading.
  • The Earth, which is our planet, needs protection.
  • Vietnam, where I live, is a beautiful country.
  • My friend, whose name is John, speaks English well.
  • December, when it's cold, is the last month.

sections.heading: 4-11. Các phần còn lại
sections.content: Getting Started, A Closer Look 1-2, Communication, Skills 1-2, Looking Back, Project

problemTypes.name: Dạng 1: Non-defining với Who/Which
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Có dấu phẩy
  • who (người), which (vật)
  • KHÔNG dùng 'that'

examples.question: My brother ______ lives in Hanoi is a teacher.
examples.solution: My brother, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher.
examples.explanation: Non-defining: có dấu phẩy, dùng who (không dùng that)

examples.question: Ha Long Bay ______ is in Vietnam is beautiful.
examples.solution: Ha Long Bay, which is in Vietnam, is beautiful.
examples.explanation: Non-defining: có dấu phẩy, dùng which (không dùng that)

examples.question: The Earth ______ is our planet needs protection.
examples.solution: The Earth, which is our planet, needs protection.
examples.explanation: Non-defining: có dấu phẩy, dùng which

problemTypes.name: Dạng 2: Non-defining với Whose/Where/When
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • whose (sở hữu)
  • where (nơi chốn)
  • when (thời gian)
  • Có dấu phẩy

examples.question: My friend ______ father is a doctor lives here.
examples.solution: My friend, whose father is a doctor, lives here.

examples.question: Vietnam ______ I live is a beautiful country.
examples.solution: Vietnam, where I live, is a beautiful country.

examples.question: Summer ______ it's hot is my favorite season.
examples.solution: Summer, when it's hot, is my favorite season.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 3: Phân biệt Defining vs Non-defining
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Defining: không dấu phẩy, cần thiết, dùng 'that'
  • Non-defining: có dấu phẩy, bổ sung, KHÔNG dùng 'that'

examples.question: The student who studies hard will pass. (Defining hay Non-defining?)
examples.solution: Defining - không có dấu phẩy, cần thiết để xác định học sinh nào.

examples.question: My brother, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher. (Defining hay Non-defining?)
examples.solution: Non-defining - có dấu phẩy, bổ sung thông tin về anh trai (đã biết anh trai nào).

examples.question: Ha Long Bay, ______ is in Vietnam, is beautiful. (that hay which?)
examples.solution: Ha Long Bay, which is in Vietnam, is beautiful.

problemTypes.name: Dạng 4: Sửa lỗi Non-defining
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Kiểm tra dấu phẩy
  • Không dùng 'that'
  • Không bỏ đại từ quan hệ

examples.question: Sửa lỗi: My brother that lives in Hanoi is a teacher.
examples.solution: My brother, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher.

examples.question: Sửa lỗi: Ha Long Bay that is in Vietnam is beautiful.
examples.solution: Ha Long Bay, which is in Vietnam, is beautiful.

examples.question: Sửa lỗi: My friend lives in Hanoi is a teacher. (thiếu đại từ quan hệ)
examples.solution: My friend, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher.

exercises.question: My brother, ______ lives in Hanoi, is a teacher.
Ha Long Bay, ______ is in Vietnam, is beautiful.
The Earth, ______ is our planet, needs protection.
My friend, ______ father is a doctor, lives here.
Vietnam, ______ I live, is a beautiful country.
Summer, ______ it's hot, is my favorite season.
My mother, ______ is a teacher, loves reading.
London, ______ I was born, is a big city.
December, ______ it's cold, is the last month.
My sister, ______ name is Mary, is a doctor.
Which are non-defining relative clauses? (Select all that apply)
options: My brother, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher.
The student who studies hard will pass.
Ha Long Bay, which is in Vietnam, is beautiful.
The book that I read was good.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: có dấu phẩy (non-defining). Sai: không có dấu phẩy (defining)

exercises.question: Which are correct non-defining clauses? (Select all that apply)
options: My friend, who lives here, is kind.
Ha Long Bay, that is beautiful, is in Vietnam.
Vietnam, where I live, is nice.
My brother, lives in Hanoi, is a teacher.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: who/where với dấu phẩy. Sai: 'that' trong non-defining, thiếu đại từ quan hệ

exercises.question: Which rules apply to non-defining clauses? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: Tất cả đều đúng: phải có dấu phẩy, không dùng 'that', không bỏ đại từ, dùng 'who' cho người

exercises.question: Fill in: My brother, ______ lives in Hanoi, is a teacher.
Fill in: Ha Long Bay, ______ is in Vietnam, is beautiful.
Fill in: Vietnam, ______ I live, is a beautiful country.
Correct the error: My brother that lives in Hanoi is a teacher. → My brother, ______ lives in Hanoi, is a teacher.
Rearrange with commas: brother / My / who / lives / in / Hanoi / is / teacher / a / . / Bay / Ha Long / which / is / in / Vietnam / is / beautiful / .
exercises.sample_answer: My brother, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher. Ha Long Bay, which is in Vietnam, is beautiful.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: Non-defining clauses với dấu phẩy

exercises.question: Add information: My brother is a teacher. (He lives in Hanoi) → Use non-defining clause
exercises.sample_answer: My brother, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher.
exercises.explanation: Thêm thông tin: dùng non-defining clause với dấu phẩy

exercises.question: Correct all errors: Ha Long Bay that is in Vietnam is beautiful. My friend lives in Hanoi is a teacher.
exercises.sample_answer: Ha Long Bay, which is in Vietnam, is beautiful. My friend, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher.

exercises.question: Rearrange: friend / My / whose / father / is / doctor / a / lives / here / . / Vietnam / where / live / I / is / beautiful / country / a / .
exercises.sample_answer: My friend, whose father is a doctor, lives here. Vietnam, where I live, is a beautiful country.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: Non-defining với whose (sở hữu) và where (nơi chốn)

exercises.question: Compare and explain: 1) The student who studies hard will pass. 2) My brother, who lives in Hanoi, is a teacher. (Explain the difference between defining and non-defining)
exercises.sample_answer: Sentence 1 is a defining relative clause (no commas, identifies which student). Sentence 2 is a non-defining relative clause (has commas, adds extra information about my brother who is already identified). Câu 1 là mệnh đề xác định (không dấu phẩy, xác định học sinh nào). Câu 2 là mệnh đề không xác định (có dấu phẩy, bổ sung thông tin).
exercises.explanation: Giải thích sự khác biệt: Defining (không dấu phẩy, cần thiết) vs Non-defining (có dấu phẩy, bổ sung)
